name: agentspec_evolve
description: Evolve an agent manifest based on sprint retrospective data. Applies rules: high failure → stronger model, low clarity → add traits, many interventions → adjust parameters.
implementation: import sys,json;sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/agentspec/src');sys.path.insert(0,'/home/alpibru/workspace/caloron-noether/orchestrator');from agentspec.parser.manifest import AgentManifest;from agentspec.parser.loader import agent_hash;from agentspec_bridge import evolve_agent_manifest;d=json.load(sys.stdin);m=AgentManifest(**d['manifest']);e,c=evolve_agent_manifest(m,d['retro'],{},d['sprint_id']);r={'evolved':e.model_dump(exclude_none=True) if e else None,'evolved_version':e.version if e else None,'evolved_hash':agent_hash(e) if e else None,'changes':[{'field':x.field,'new_value':x.new_value,'reason':x.reason} for x in c]};print(json.dumps(r))
